operational_knowledge_units.title: Sort lifecycle includes Start-up, Running, Bagout, and Shutdown phases
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide describes the lifecycle of a sort as a sequence of named phases: Start-up, Running, Bagout, and Shutdown.
observed_evidence: Bulleted descriptions appear under each phase
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Lifecycle of a sort consists of Start-up, Running, Bagout, and Shutdown phases in the OptiSweep system.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Start-up moves AGVs from power cycling to staged for the sort
operational_knowledge_units.summary: During Start-up, AGVs transition from a power cycling state to a staged condition for the sort.
observed_evidence: Start-up bullet: 'Takes AGVs from a power cycling state to being staged for the sort'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: In Start-up, AGVs move from power cycling state to being staged for the sort.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Running phase is the main sorting period with AGVs delivering full totes to tippers for bagging
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Running phase is described as the bulk of the sort, when items are sorted and AGVs transport full totes to tippers for bagging.
observed_evidence: Running bullet: 'Bulk of the sort where items are sorted and AGVs take full totes to tippers for bagging'

relationships.target: AGVs take full totes to tippers

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: During Running, items are sorted and AGVs take full totes to tippers for bagging; this is the bulk of the sort.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Bagout cycles all locations with items remaining in a tote to finish out
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Bagout phase cycles all locations that still have any items in a tote in order to finish the sort.
observed_evidence: Bagout bullet: 'Cycles all locations that have any items in a tote to finish out'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Bagout cycles all locations that have any items in a tote to finish out the sort.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Shutdown stages AGVs so they can cycle to chargers for the next sort
operational_knowledge_units.summary: During Shutdown, AGVs are staged in positions that allow them to cycle to chargers in preparation for the next sort.
observed_evidence: Shutdown bullet: 'Stages AGVs in a position where they can cycle to chargers to prepare for the next sort'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Shutdown stages AGVs where they can cycle to chargers to prepare for the next sort.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Discarded procedure candidate: sort lifecycle phase descriptions
preconditions: Slide provides lifecycle descriptions but no explicit operator action sequence
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Overview slide listing Start-up, Running, Bagout, and Shutdown with one descriptive bullet per phase.
warnings: Rejected as a procedure because the slide is an overview of phases and state/behavior descriptions, not explicit reusable action guidance.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded procedure candidate for slide 10: the slide describes lifecycle phases and AGV/tote behavior but does not provide explicit operational steps.
